title: Su-mil
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Grappler}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Su-mil
"Grappler" |homeworld=[[Kariek]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Eickarie]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= *[[Hu-shi-crive]] Tribe **[[Hu-shi-crive]] Family *[[United Tribes of Kariek]] *[[Empire of the Hand]] **[[Unit Aurek-Seven]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Your role was to help end the war and lift the oppression of your world|[[Jorm Whistler Mackenni|Twister]] to Su-mil|''[[Fool's Bargain]]''}} '''Su-mil''' was an [[Eickarie]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kariek]]. Shortly before [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], he joined the military of the [[Empire of the Hand]], and became a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] with the [[501st Legion (Empire of the Hand)|501st Legion]], using the warrior name '''Grappler'''. Originally, Su-mil was a freedom-fighter with the resistance on his homeworld. He first encountered the four troopers of stormtrooper [[Unit Aurek-Seven]] during the battle to liberate Kariek from "[[the Warlord]]," and after the battle, squad leader [[Jorm Whistler Mackenni|Twister]] offered him a position in the military of the Empire of the Hand. Su-mil became a stormtrooper, and after Twister's retirement, replaced him in Aurek-Seven. He seems to have risen rapidly to the position of squad leader, and remained with the squad until at least 22 ABY. In that year, Grappler and the other three troopers of his unit [[Expedition to Outbound Flight|accompanied]] [[Chak Fel]] to [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]], and participated in the [[Battle of the Redoubt]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Fool's Bargain]]'' {{1st|Survivor's Quest}} *''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|Fool's Bargain}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|148|Imperial Icons|reprint=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Su-mil |fi=Su-mil }} [[Category:Eickaries]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of the 501st Legion (Empire of the Hand)]] [[Category:Stormtroopers of the Empire of the Hand]]
